title: Run final RPL regression gates
description: Run formatting, direct ipv6/link/rpl/node tests, strict scoped Clippy, integrity searches, and diff checks without unrelated edits or commit.
acceptance_criteria: All requested commands pass with exact results recorded; prior canonical/full-path tests pass; git diff --check passes.
close_reason: Changed-file rustfmt check passed with skip_children; direct tests passed: lichen-link 29 unit + 2 vectors + 1 doc, lichen-ipv6 13 unit, lichen-rpl 125 unit + 2 vectors + 5 mesh, lichen-node 179 unit + 2 vectors + docs. Strict library-scoped Clippy passed for all four crates. Scheduler unchanged, integrity searches passed, and git diff --check passed.
